title: Assertion error in rel_find_exp_ (sqlsmith)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE netcdf_files (file_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, location VARCHAR NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE idxs (table_id INTEGER, id INTEGER, name VARCHAR UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO idxs (table_id, id, name) VALUES (1, 1, 'index1'), (2, 2, 'index2');
SELECT sample_4.x AS c0, sample_0.location AS c1 FROM netcdf_files AS sample_0 RIGHT JOIN idxs AS sample_1 ON (sample_0.file_id = sample_1.id) WHERE sample_1.table_id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Right join with false condition on multiple tables
